routes.documentation: Liste des quiz par matière (via subjectId)

responses.label: Quizzes Maths
Quizzes Histoire-Géo

responses.body:
[
  { "id": "m1q1", "quizId": "m1", "text": "Quelle est la fraction équivalente à 1/2 ?", "choices": ["2/4", "1/3", "3/5", "2/3"], "correctIndex": 0, "explanation": "Multiplier numérateur et dénominateur par 2." },
  { "id": "m1q2", "quizId": "m1", "text": "Si 3x = 12, alors x = ?", "choices": ["2", "3", "4", "6"], "correctIndex": 2 },
  { "id": "m1q3", "quizId": "m1", "text": "50% de 200 = ?", "choices": ["50", "75", "100", "125"], "correctIndex": 2 },
  { "id": "m1q4", "quizId": "m1", "text": "Quelle écriture est proportionnelle ?", "choices": ["(2,3) → (4,5)", "(2,3) → (4,6)", "(3,5) → (6,8)", "(1,4) → (3,8)"], "correctIndex": 1 },
  { "id": "m1q5", "quizId": "m1", "text": "Simplifier 6/9", "choices": ["2/3", "3/4", "4/6", "1/2"], "correctIndex": 0 }
]
responses.label: Questions m1

responses.body:
[
  { "id": "h1q1", "quizId": "h1", "text": "En quelle année débute la Révolution française ?", "choices": ["1776", "1789", "1793", "1815"], "correctIndex": 1 },
  { "id": "h1q2", "quizId": "h1", "text": "Quel événement marque la fin de l’Ancien Régime ?", "choices": ["Serment du Jeu de Paume", "Prise de la Bastille", "Chute de Robespierre", "Restauration"], "correctIndex": 1 },
  { "id": "h1q3", "quizId": "h1", "text": "Quel document proclame les droits des citoyens ?", "choices": ["Code civil", "Déclaration des droits de l’Homme et du citoyen", "Constitution de 1791", "Acte de l’Union"], "correctIndex": 1 },
  { "id": "h1q4", "quizId": "h1", "text": "Qui était le roi de France en 1789 ?", "choices": ["Louis XIV", "Louis XV", "Louis XVI", "Napoléon Ier"], "correctIndex": 2 },
  { "id": "h1q5", "quizId": "h1", "text": "Quelle période suit immédiatement 1789 ?", "choices": ["Terreur", "Directoire", "Monarchie de Juillet", "Assemblée nationale constituante"], "correctIndex": 3 }
]
responses.label: Questions h1
